abilities.name: Don't Mind Me
abilities.text: The following do not restrict this model from declaring the Interact action: being engaged, leaving engagement with a Walk, and targeting a marker with an enemy in base contact.

abilities.name: Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

actions.name: Deadly Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action was generated by the Charge action, it deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Like the Wind
triggers.text: Move this model up to 5", ignoring enemy models.

triggers.name: "AHHH, MY EYE!"
triggers.text: When resolving, deal +1 damage and move the target up to 3".

actions.name: Unhinge
actions.costs_and_restrictions: For each raise this action receives, an ally engaged with the target may declare an attack action.

triggers.name: Shrug Off
triggers.text: Remove one token from this model.

triggers.name: Blank Stare
triggers.text: Discard a card. Target gains a Slow token and must discard a card.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Onward
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may declare the Walk action.

triggers.name: Stalk Through Dreams
triggers.text: When resolving the generated action, this model may move through models. Enemy models moved through this way gain a Fright token.
